revision.comment: [[Template:EstcatCountry]] now needs no year parameters, replaced: {{estcatCountry|181|8|Japan}} → {{EstcatCountry|Japan}}}}

{{EstcatCountry|Japan}}
[[Category:1818 establishments in Asia|Japan]]
